headline: Arrivia and KrisFlyer Expand Partnership to Launch Cruise Redemptions with Miles
summary: arrivia and KrisFlyer, the lifestyle rewards programme of the Singapore Airlines Group, are elevating member benefits with the launch of cruise bookings using KrisFlyer miles. This enhanced partnership offers KrisFlyer members expanded opportunities to utilise miles through KrisFlyer Cruise, arrivia's exclusive cruise platform. This enhanced partnership enables members to unlock high-value cruise holidays through KrisFlyer Cruise, arrivia's dedicated cruise platform, giving members more meaningf
